Episteme 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT

    Deprecated API

    Contents

    • Classes

    • Fields
    • Methods
    • Constructors
    • Enum Constants
    • Deprecated Classes
      Class
      Description
      org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.swarm.ACO
      Use ACO instead.
      org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.swarm.ParticleSwarmOptimization
      Use PSO instead.
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants
      Use ArtForm instead for art categories.
    • Deprecated Enum Classes
      Enum Class
      Description
      org.episteme.social.law.Statute.Status
      Use StatuteStatus instead.
      org.episteme.social.law.Statute.Type
      Use StatuteType instead.
      org.episteme.social.sociology.Religion.Type
      org.episteme.social.sociology.Society.Type
      org.episteme.social.sociology.survey.Question.Type
    • Deprecated Fields
      Field
      Description
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.ARCHITECTURE
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.CINEMA
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.COMICS
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.CRAFTING
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.DANCE
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.GAMING
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.LITERATURE
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.MUSIC
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.PAINTING
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.PHOTOGRAPHY
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.POETRY
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.RADIO
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.SCULPTURE
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.TELEVISION
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.THEATER
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.UNKNOWN
      org.episteme.social.history.archeology.ArcheologyConstants.ANTIQUE
      org.episteme.social.history.archeology.ArcheologyConstants.CONTEMPORARY
      org.episteme.social.history.archeology.ArcheologyConstants.MEDIEVAL
      org.episteme.social.history.archeology.ArcheologyConstants.MODERN
      org.episteme.social.history.calendars.SevenDaysWeek.DAYNAMES
      Use SevenDaysWeek.DAY_NAMES instead.
    • Deprecated Methods
      Method
      Description
      org.episteme.core.mathematics.loaders.openmath.OMSymbol.getCD()
      use the getCd method instead.
      org.episteme.natural.chemistry.loaders.cml.cmlimpl.CMLBaseImpl.addTextChild(String)
      use setTextChild instead
      org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.swarm.ACO.getBestTour()
      org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.swarm.ACO.getBestTourLength()
      org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.swarm.ACO.solve(int)
      org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.swarm.ParticleSwarmOptimization.optimize(int)
      org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.swarm.ParticleSwarmOptimization.setCognitiveCoefficient(Real)
      org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.swarm.ParticleSwarmOptimization.setInertiaWeight(Real)
      org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.swarm.ParticleSwarmOptimization.setSocialCoefficient(Real)
      org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.swarm.ParticleSwarmOptimization.useConstrictionCoefficients()
      org.episteme.natural.physics.classical.mechanics.MechanicsBackendManager.getAllBackends()
      Use staticAllBackends
      org.episteme.natural.physics.classical.mechanics.MechanicsBackendManager.select(String)
      Use staticSelect
      org.episteme.natural.physics.quantum.QuantumBackendManager.getAllBackends()
      Use staticAllBackends
      org.episteme.natural.physics.quantum.QuantumBackendManager.select(String)
      Use staticSelect
      org.episteme.server.server.proto.DeviceCommand.Builder.getMutableParameters()
      org.episteme.server.server.proto.DeviceCommand.Builder.getParameters()
      org.episteme.server.server.proto.DeviceCommand.getParameters()
      org.episteme.server.server.proto.DeviceCommandOrBuilder.getParameters()
      org.episteme.server.server.proto.DeviceData.Builder.getMutableNumericReadings()
      org.episteme.server.server.proto.DeviceData.Builder.getNumericReadings()
      org.episteme.server.server.proto.DeviceData.getNumericReadings()
      org.episteme.server.server.proto.DeviceDataOrBuilder.getNumericReadings()
      org.episteme.server.server.proto.Priority.valueOf(int)
      org.episteme.server.server.proto.Status.valueOf(int)
      org.episteme.social.arts.ArtsConstants.getCategoryName(int)
      Use ExtensibleEnum.toString()
      org.episteme.social.economics.Organigram.getTimestamp()
      org.episteme.social.economics.PotentialResource.getLegacyKind()
      org.episteme.social.economics.PotentialResource.setLegacyKind(int)
      org.episteme.social.economics.Resource.getTimestamp()
      org.episteme.social.history.calendars.AlternateCalendar.after(AlternateCalendar)
      Use AlternateCalendar.isAfter(AlternateCalendar) instead. Note: Original implementation had inverted logic.
      org.episteme.social.history.calendars.AlternateCalendar.before(AlternateCalendar)
      Use AlternateCalendar.isBefore(AlternateCalendar) instead. Note: Original implementation had inverted logic.
      org.episteme.social.history.calendars.AlternateCalendar.fldiv(long, long)
      Use AlternateCalendar.floorDiv(long, long) instead.
      org.episteme.social.law.Statute.Status.toStatuteStatus()
      org.episteme.social.law.Statute.Type.toStatuteType()
      org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml.Sentence.getNoOfNTs()
      As of org.episteme.social.ml.tigerxml 1.1 - use Sentence.getNTCount() instead.
      org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml.Sentence.getNoOfTs()
      As of org.episteme.social.ml.tigerxml 1.1 - use Sentence.getTCount() instead.
      org.episteme.social.sociology.Religion.getLegacyType()
      org.episteme.social.sociology.Religion.Type.toReligionType()
      org.episteme.social.sociology.RoleKind.fromInt(int)
      Use RoleKind constants directly
      org.episteme.social.sociology.Situation.addParticipant(Individual, String, int)
      org.episteme.social.sociology.Situation.getIdentification()
      org.episteme.social.sociology.Society.Type.toSocietyType()
      org.episteme.social.sociology.survey.Question.getLegacyType()
      org.episteme.social.sociology.survey.Question.Type.toQuestionType()
    • Deprecated Constructors
      Constructor
      Description
      org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.swarm.ACO(int, double[][])
      org.episteme.natural.computing.ai.swarm.ParticleSwarmOptimization(Function<Real[], Real>, int, Real[], Real[], int)

      org.episteme.social.sociology.Religion(String, Religion.Type)
      org.episteme.social.sociology.Role(Individual, String, Situation, int)
      Use Role(Individual, String, Situation, RoleKind) instead
      org.episteme.social.sociology.survey.Question(String, Question.Type)

      Enum Constant
      Description
      org.episteme.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.matrices.solvers.EigenDecomposition.Algorithm.INVERSE_ITERATION
      Not implemented in 1.0. Use SIMPLIFIED_POWER_ITERATION instead.

      org.episteme.social.sociology.Religion.Type.SHAMANISTIC

      org.episteme.social.sociology.Society.Type.HORTICULTURAL

      org.episteme.social.sociology.Society.Type.INDUSTRIAL
      org.episteme.social.sociology.Society.Type.INFORMATION
